title: Set Up a SpiderBook Appointment-Booking Flow
summary: Set up an appointment-booking flow via SpiderBook (the cal.com-backed engine) and embed it on any tenant page with the {% booking %} Liquid tag. Use whenever the user asks for 'add appointment booking', 'calendar embed', 'scheduling flow', 'book a call', 'cal.com integration', 'set up a booking page', or any appointment-scheduling request. Walks through booking_create_flow, archetype selection (15-min discovery / 30-min consult / etc), embedding via the Liquid tag on a page, and verifying the booking confirmation flow end to end.
